final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing movie poster reimagining 大话西游 in a 90s Hong Kong cinema aesthetic.

Style/medium: needs a 90年代港片 film aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a foreground embracing couple and distant background figures
Subject: must include 至尊宝 and 紫霞 kissing/embracing on a city wall (foreground), 牛魔王 and 唐僧 standing in the distance (background)
Scene/backdrop: must include a dramatic city wall setting
Lighting/mood: needs a cinematic, emotionally charged atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction evoking 90s Hong Kong film color grading — exact tones and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: must include film grain texture throughout
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
